hooks.command: printf '%s' 'Prymer is connected. Before starting work, call the get_context_for_injection MCP tool for the active Prymer channel (confirm it with the user; do not pick one from list_channels yourself) to load what other sessions already know.'

printf '%s' 'Context is about to be compacted. If you have unsaved working context for this task, call the capture_context MCP tool now to preserve it as a private Prymer note before the window is trimmed — it stays private until you share or promote it.'

printf '%s' 'If you finished a meaningful chunk of work, checkpoint it to the Prymer channel per its capture mode. Follow the guidance field returned by get_context_for_injection: Auto means call share_session with trigger=agent_auto; Propose means ask the user first; Off means keep it private.'
